components.name: create
components.description: Creates a new agent or skill following CC best practices. Updates the manifest.

components.name: site-scanner
components.description: Playwright browser agent that systematically navigates a website and extracts structured content from each page type.

components.name: web-researcher
components.description: Research agent that gathers information about an entity from public web sources — news, industry data, financial signals.

components.name: company-profiler
components.description: Synthesis agent that takes raw site content and web research and produces a structured company profile following the Company Profile Taxonomy.

components.name: problem-mapper
components.description: Analytical agent that maps an organization's likely problem landscape using a problem typology taxonomy weighted by company profile properties.

components.name: capability-matcher
components.description: Matrix intersection agent that matches identified business problems against AI capabilities to identify opportunities.

components.name: opportunity-ranker
components.description: Scoring and prioritization agent that produces a final ranked opportunity list with conversation framing.

components.name: pitch-builder
components.description: Narrative generation agent that creates structured pitch briefs for leadership conversations.

components.name: report-compiler
components.description: Report generation agent that assembles pipeline outputs into a polished interactive HTML report.
